name: Fresh Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 Long loaf fresh bread, or two regular size loaves
1 lb Bacon, diced and cooked until not quite crisp, saving the bacon grease
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the bread into bite-sized chunks and place in a large bowl.
2. Dice and cook the bacon until not quite crisp, saving the bacon grease. Chop the onion and celery and add them to the stuffing mixture along with the cooked bacon and its grease.
3. Add the eggs, spices (including sweet basil), butter, and mix together. Use warm water as needed to bind the mixture so it holds its shape.
4. Rinse the turkey inside and out, then salt lightly. Loosely pack the stuffing into the turkey cavity. Dry the outside of the turkey with paper towels.
5. Lightly coat the outside and top of the bird with additional butter, then season with salt and pepper according to the cooking directions (20 minutes per pound).
6. If there is leftover stuffing, shape it into balls to place beside the turkey about 1-1/2 hours before the end of baking time.
